title: The Straw Hats Are Blamed
description: On pages 1–4, this part follows Unknown person #1, Narrator, Royal Guards, Brook, Fukaboshi, King Neptune, Fish-Man Island Citizens. The core story beat is the straw hats are blamed.
scene: The scene centers on the straw hats are blamed, with Unknown person #1, Narrator, Royal Guards, Brook, Fukaboshi, King Neptune, Fish-Man Island Citizens driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I don't care what you say...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: This was one step too far!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I quite agree! You should show a little penitence!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're the ones who started this fight, not me!! You're as guilty as I am!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I was planning to make a run for it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How did a simple day of sightseeing and shopping end up like this...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Well, there's nothing I can do about it now, is there?!!! so quit yelling!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dwww- www...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What kind of excuse is that?!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: "So I stopped by Fish-Man Island and just happened to conquer the Royal Palace"?! What kind of monster pirate are you?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You think I should've just let 'em beat us?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I told you a million times we should just run!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How do we run from a place like this?! And besides, Luffy's not here!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What have you doneee?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's a good point!! Where has he got to, anyway?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Who knows an

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We're in a real hurry! So will you please just tell me where~?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That's right! We've gotta find out where Luffy-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Where is the treasure stored?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ohhh, stop that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?...Why?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Quit the innocent act, too!! Grow a conscience already!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Fear not, my friends!! When things look tough, you just gotta sing a song and cheer right uuu quup!c'mon!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It'll work ou tut! It'll work ouuut!And even if it doesn't, someday you'll die anyway! Yeah!!

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: You can shut up too, soul king!!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: Your majesty...!! are you all right?!

dialogue.speaker: Royal Guards
dialogue.text: to think that King Neptunee, Warrior of the sea, could be reduced to this...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Mannnhhh... with my back playing up like this, I can hardly fight at all, age is a terrible thing...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I have failed you all...!! My apologies!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: you fools... when Prince Fukaboshi, Prince Ryuboshi and Prince Mamboshi Return...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: ...when you are faced with the three champions of the Neptunee army...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, I sincerely doubt any of you will leave this place un- scared!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ughhh...!! If we had filled the castle with water, they would stand no chance against us...!! yet instead, all the water has been removed...!!

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: At any rate... we can't stay on fishman Island now.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: Where's the sunny? We'll have to round everyone up and set sail again.

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: But the sunny's coating was torn clean off when we entered the island!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You're all leaving already?!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: And the log pose has been acting strange ever since we got here! It hasn't shown the slightest signs of settling...

dialogue.speaker: King Neptune
dialogue.text: Oh, you must be joking...! You hope to Traverse the new world with a simple pose of that nature?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You pirates are truly ignorant...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hm? We can't use this? What do you mean?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I might tell you if you unite me.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: 1) Hmph...

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Ahhh...!! That must be Prince Fukabosh!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How very odd... What do the guards think they're doing...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hello. Who's there?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Ahhhh!! Don't you answer it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: PRINCE FUKA- BOSH!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: AKKAMAMBO! FULURIFURII!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: (a) a

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Help UUUS!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Oh, shut up over there!!!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: PRINCE MAMBO- SHIII!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Why, dear brother...!! Some kind of incident seems to be afoot- la-fi-do!

dialogue.speaker: Fukaboshi
dialogue.text: Sure sounds like it!! Are Father and Shirahoshii all right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: ...It's me!! Fukabosh!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: What is happening within the Palace?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and the main gate and palace gates be opened at once!!

summary: The Straw Hats Are Blamed. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
